name: Australian Agricultural Company Limited.
analysis: AAC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.3200, stop A$1.2771, target A$1.4487 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
